THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALERIO, MAXIMILIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1685 SACRAMENTO ST, #23, STAYED UNTIL JAN-10-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT. VACATES PREMISES BY 3:00PM ON 10-JAN-95, PLTF. WILL SIGN PAPERS TO DISMISS ACTION WITH OUT PREJ; DEFT. TO PREPARE AND FILE PAPERS; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).
